exploration_notes: **Kubernetes/kubernetes**: Health endpoints are implemented via a pluggable `HealthChecker` interface in `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/healthz/healthz.go`. The `InstallHandler` (for /healthz), `InstallReadyzHandler` (for /readyz), and `InstallLivezHandler` (for /livez) functions register HTTP handlers. The `healthCheckRegistry` in `healthz.go` (server package) manages per-endpoint check lists. Checks include: `PingHealthz` (always OK), `LogHealthz` (verifies logging isn't blocked), `N
